Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Rectal adenocarcinoma
ICD10 Code: C20
Differentiation: Moderately differentiated

Symptoms include rectal bleeding, altered bowel habit, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 6 weeks. Additional symptoms include early satiety. Past medical history significant for hypertension.

MRI pelvis on 05/10/2024: T3b, N1, CRM threatened, EMVI negative.
